description: A perfect option to go with your fashionable outfits, this pink handbag from yelloe comes with a laptop compartment and a spacious inner to hold your office essentials.Height: 27 cmWidth: 38 cmDepth: 7 cmSynthetic leather upper with brand badge on the frontOne main compartment with fabric lining, a zippered pocket and a padded laptop separatorTwo short handlesOne removable, adjustable shoulder strapQuilted patterning on the upperCareWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
